//: Staged for the future standalone repo (see ../SPLIT-PLAN.md). Not consumed yet — today the monorepo root package.json + relative imports are authoritative. The exports/files maps below are live-ready so consumers can resolve proof's modules + assets from the installed package (e.g. import.meta.resolve('@tjakoen/proof/board.css')), which is how PANTRY mounts PROOF without copying files. Root '.' entry (the TS composition surface) is added at extraction.
name: @tjakoen/proof
description: PROOF — the AI plan board: plans-as-markdown (plans/*.md) rendered as a kanban projection. The files are the source of truth; the board never writes.
author: Tjakoen Stolk <tjakoen.s@gmail.com> (https://tjakoen.github.io)
